characters.appearance: A young South Asian man in his late 20s with a medium build and a dusky complexion. He has short, dark, somewhat messy hair, a mustache, and light stubble.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue and white checkered button-down shirt with sleeves rolled up to the elbows, paired with light blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Initially skeptical and slightly condescending, his expression shifts to surprise and then genuine interest and eagerness.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early to mid-20s with a slim build and a fair complexion. She has long, straight, dark hair parted in the middle. She has soft facial features.
characters.wardrobe: A white three-quarter sleeve top with a pink floral pattern, black track pants, and a magenta-colored scarf (dupatta) draped around her neck. She wears a watch with a green strap on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Initially appears slightly annoyed and defensive, then becomes confident, articulate, and assertive. She ends by being persuasive and encouraging when addressing the camera.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: ठीक है, मान गया कि तुम्हें जॉब करनी है। लेकिन जॉब में सबसे इंग्लिश में बात करनी पड़ती है। तुम तो हिंदी मीडियम से हो। हर दूसरी चीज़ का मतलब तुम मुझसे पूछती हो। [Okay, I agree you want to get a job. But in a job, you have to speak in English with everyone. You are from a Hindi medium background. You ask me the meaning of every other thing.]

Character B says: For your information, I can speak English fluently and confidently. I don't need any help in understanding anything. I used to be topper in my school. And I can contribute better to my family with a job.

Character A says: अरे, तुमने इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कैसे सीखी? [Hey, how did you learn such good English?]

Character B says: मैंने Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड किया है। इसके AI ट्यूटर के साथ जब तुम ऑफिस जाते थे तब मैं रोज़ प्रैक्टिस करती थी। और अब मेरी इंग्लिश में कॉन्फिडेंस आ गया है। अब मैं इंटरव्यू में भी इंग्लिश में बात कर सकती हूं। [I have downloaded the Supernova app. With its AI tutor, I used to practice daily when you went to the office. And now I have confidence in my English. Now I can speak in English even in an interview.]

Character A says: AI? कितने पैसे खर्च हुए इसपे? [AI? How much money was spent on this?]

Character B says: बहुत ही अफोर्डेबल है, कोई भी ले सकता है। [It's very affordable, anyone can get it.]

Character A says: क्या बात कर रही हो? फिर तो मैं आज ही से ट्राय करूंगा। मुझे भी ऑफिस में इंग्लिश काम आएगी। कब तक एक ही सैलरी पे रहूंगा। [What are you saying? Then I will try it from today itself. English will be useful for me in the office too. How long will I remain on the same salary?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: fear of speaking English holding back career prospects.
- Introduces the solution (Supernova) through a dramatic reveal of fluent English.
- Highlights key features: AI tutor, daily practice, and affordability.

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: क्या आप भी मेरी तरह कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना चाहते हैं? तो आज ही Supernova इंस्टॉल करो और रोज़ प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। [Do you also want to speak English with confidence like me? Then install Supernova today and start practicing daily.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Breaks the fourth wall to directly address the viewer.
- Delivers a clear call to action to download the app.
- Reinforces the core benefit of speaking English with confidence.
